statement.p: The graph plots the number of cancer diagnoses in Oregon over time, and a trend-line has been drawn.
Estimate the slope of the trend-line.

solution.p: Do your best to identify two points on the line (which are not necessarily the plotted data points). With this line, it seems (2008,20000) and (2020,23000) are two such points.
So the slope is about 250 diagnoses per year. This is only an estimate since we are not certain the two points we chose are actually on the line.
